channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: India, Israel Identify New Defence Projects To Build Joint Resilience

media:content.media:description: India and Israel finalise a strategic defence pact for joint development and resilience.

item.description: India and Israel advance defence ties with a new special strategic partnership framework.
item.content:encoded: India and Israel advance defence ties with a new special strategic partnership framework.

item.title: 20 Drown While Swimming In Unsupervised Areas In France Amid Heatwave

media:content.media:description: "There have been around 20 deaths since last weekend," French sports minister said

item.description: Much of France was set to experience temperatures around 40 degrees Celsius (104 degrees Fahrenheit) on Tuesday, forecaster MeteoFrance said.
item.content:encoded: Much of France was set to experience temperatures around 40 degrees Celsius (104 degrees Fahrenheit) on Tuesday, forecaster MeteoFrance said.

item.title: What Pakistan Could Gain From Brokering US-Iran Peace Talks

media:content.media:description: Pakistan is targeting economic growth of 4.0% and inflation of 8.2% for the coming fiscal year

item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and army chief Field Marshal Asim Munir attended talks between Iran and the US in the Swiss town of Buergenstock last weekend
item.content:encoded: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and army chief Field Marshal Asim Munir attended talks between Iran and the US in the Swiss town of Buergenstock last weekend

item.title: "Confusing Negotiators": JD Vance On Iran's Araghchi's On-Camera 'Snub'

media:content.media:description: Abbas Araghchi was seen greeting Shehbaz Sharif, while JD Vance remained behind

item.description: The visuals from the talks had sparked attention as JD Vance was present in the room while Abbas Araghchi appeared to ignore him and walk away without any interaction.
item.content:encoded: The visuals from the talks had sparked attention as JD Vance was present in the room while Abbas Araghchi appeared to ignore him and walk away without any interaction.

item.title: Japan Struggles With More Children Getting Involved In Upskirting Crimes

media:content.media:description: A growing number of children are being linked to upskirting offences in Japan

item.description: According to police data cited by CNN, reported voyeurism cases involving minors jumped nearly sixfold in 2024 compared to the previous year and increased again in 2025.
item.content:encoded: According to police data cited by CNN, reported voyeurism cases involving minors jumped nearly sixfold in 2024 compared to the previous year and increased again in 2025.

item.title: The Mistakes That Sealed Keir Starmer's Fate

media:content.media:description: Keir Starmer announces resignation due to low popularity and electoral setbacks.

item.description: Keir Starmer resigns as UK Prime Minister after poor election results and political difficulties.
item.content:encoded: Keir Starmer resigns as UK Prime Minister after poor election results and political difficulties.

item.title: US Teacher Who Sexually Abused Students Later Blackmailed Over OnlyFans Account For Better Grades

media:content.media:description: Maris Nichols faces multiple charges after allegedly having sex with students.

item.description: Maris Nichols, a 25-year-old teacher at Alexander High School, has been accused of sexually abusing students.
item.content:encoded: Maris Nichols, a 25-year-old teacher at Alexander High School, has been accused of sexually abusing students.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | The Great Surrender: Why This Is America's Worst Humiliation In Over 50 Years
item.description: There is no precedent in recent US history for an American president accepting such humiliating terms as in the Iran deal.
item.content:encoded: There is no precedent in recent US history for an American president accepting such humiliating terms as in the Iran deal.

item.title: With Iran, US Signing Peace Deal, Where Does That Leave Netanyahu?

media:content.media:description: Netanyahu confronts dilemma balancing US alliance and military actions against Hezbollah

item.description: Netanyahu confronts dilemma balancing US alliance and military actions against Hezbollah
item.content:encoded: Netanyahu confronts dilemma balancing US alliance and military actions against Hezbollah

item.title: India, US Hold Ministerial-Level Trade Pact Talks

media:content.media:description: Bilateral trade discussions begin between India and US officials.

item.description: India and US start talks on first phase of bilateral trade agreement in New Delhi.
item.content:encoded: India and US start talks on first phase of bilateral trade agreement in New Delhi.

item.title: UK's Keir Starmer Leaves Without Managing To Explain What He Stood For

media:content.media:description: Labour won a deceptive landslide in the July 2024 general election

item.description: In opposition, Starmer's stolid managerialism helped Labour influence a nation tired of the shenanigans of Boris Johnson.
item.content:encoded: In opposition, Starmer's stolid managerialism helped Labour influence a nation tired of the shenanigans of Boris Johnson.

item.title: Ransom Note Reveals US Anchor's Mother Died Shortly After Disappearance

media:content.media:description: Authorities believe Nancy Guthrie was kidnapped, abducted or otherwise taken against her will

item.description: CNN reported Monday that one of notes revealed that Nancy Guthrie was dead - and those who kidnapped her did not mean to kill her, but she died shortly after her disappearance.
item.content:encoded: CNN reported Monday that one of notes revealed that Nancy Guthrie was dead - and those who kidnapped her did not mean to kill her, but she died shortly after her disappearance.

item.title: JD Vance Says Iran Talks Lay 'Good Foundation' For Deal To End War

media:content.media:description: The vice president departed Switzerland as technical teams were still negotiating

item.description: JD Vance and U.S. officials claimed progress on multiple fronts, including the establishment of "mechanisms" to ensure the Strait of Hormuz, a vital waterway for global energy shipments, stays open
item.content:encoded: JD Vance and U.S. officials claimed progress on multiple fronts, including the establishment of "mechanisms" to ensure the Strait of Hormuz, a vital waterway for global energy shipments, stays open

item.title: How Ukraine's Latest Drone Strategy Is Targeting Russia's Supply Lines

media:content.media:description: Ukraine says the goal is to weaken Russia's ability to sustain offensive operations

item.description: The campaign relies on a new generation of Ukrainian-made mid-range drones, including models such as the FP-2 and the Behemoth. These drones can travel between 50 and 300 kilometres
item.content:encoded: The campaign relies on a new generation of Ukrainian-made mid-range drones, including models such as the FP-2 and the Behemoth. These drones can travel between 50 and 300 kilometres

item.title: Bill To Ban Horse Carriages In New York Renamed After Indian Victim

media:content.media:description: The bill will be changed to Romanch's Law' in honour of the teenager.

item.description: New York city renames horse carriage ban bill Romanchs Law after teen dies in Central Park incident
item.content:encoded: New York city renames horse carriage ban bill Romanchs Law after teen dies in Central Park incident

item.title: Oracle Cut 21,000 Jobs in 12 Months Amid AI Adoption

media:content.media:description: Oracle cuts 21,000 jobs as AI technologies lead to workforce reduction.

item.description: Oracle reduces workforce by 21,000 employees following AI adoption.
item.content:encoded: Oracle reduces workforce by 21,000 employees following AI adoption.

item.title: 'The Timeline Is Months': Five Eyes' Big Warning Over Next AI Breakthrough

media:content.media:description: The alliance said cyber resilience had become essential for businesses.

item.description: The warning came in a joint statement from the Five Eyes Intelligence Oversight and Review Council (FIORC), a grouping of intelligence and security entities from Australia, Canada, New Zealand, the United Kingdom and the United States.
item.content:encoded: The warning came in a joint statement from the Five Eyes Intelligence Oversight and Review Council (FIORC), a grouping of intelligence and security entities from Australia, Canada, New Zealand, the United Kingdom and the United States.

item.title: "He's Got 2 Problems": Trump Criticism Follows Starmer's Exit

media:content.media:description: Trump blames Starmer for poor energy policy and delayed NATO support.

item.description: US President Donald Trump said Keir Starmer was "sort of a friend of mine" but had not been supportive enough of the United States on NATO and the Iran war.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump said Keir Starmer was "sort of a friend of mine" but had not been supportive enough of the United States on NATO and the Iran war.

item.title: JD Vance Says US May Unfreeze Some Iranian Assets, Hints At Successful Deal

media:content.media:description: It's unclear when Vance will depart Switzerland.

item.description: JD Vance's comments came after he and Iran's parliamentary speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf on Monday wrapped up a lengthy round of initial talks aimed at solidifying a permanent end to the war between the countries.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1116907/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>JD Vance's comments came after he and Iran's parliamentary speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf on Monday wrapped up a lengthy round of initial talks aimed at solidifying a permanent end to the war between the countries.

item.title: "I Am Out": Tucker Carlson Says He Won't Support Republican Party
item.description: Tucker Carlson supported Trump in 2024. After the war began, he apologised for supporting the then-presidential candidate and "misleading people," saying it wasn't intentional.
item.content:encoded: Tucker Carlson supported Trump in 2024. After the war began, he apologised for supporting the then-presidential candidate and "misleading people," saying it wasn't intentional.
